name: Grouper & Horseradish Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bell pepper in a 9-inch pie plate, cover with plastic wrap and vent, microwave at high for 2 minutes, remove and set aside.
2. Wipe the pie plate clean. Quarter the fish, arrange it in the pie plate, sprinkle with pepper; top with the sliced peppers and onion slices.
3. Microwave uncovered at high for 7-8 minutes until the fish flakes easily.
4. Drain any excess oil from the fish, then cover the pie plate. Combine the Catalina dressing and the prepared horseradish, hot sauce, and lemon juice in a 1-cup glass measure; stir well.
5. Microwave uncovered at high for an additional minute to blend the flavors.
6. Serve the sauce with the cooked fish and garnish with lemon wedges.
